domain_summary: Source-grounded academic domain library built from books and articles.

lanes.acceptance: Definitions, terminology, author language, exact same-slug block citations and embeds.
lanes.minimums: ≥6 verbatim quotes of ≥20 words, exact block embeds, Rich Definitions section.

lanes.acceptance: All numbered equations in LaTeX with equation context, notation, assumptions, same-slug block citations and embeds; no qualitative-only summary.
lanes.minimums: ALL numbered equations in LaTeX with equation context and block embeds.

lanes.acceptance: Examples, figures, diagrams, procedures, implementation details, parameter values, exact same-slug block citations and embeds.
lanes.minimums: Figures/tables, numerical examples, parameter values, and pseudocode if present.

lanes.acceptance: Limitations, caveats, fragile assumptions, boundary conditions, counterarguments, exact same-slug block citations and embeds.
lanes.minimums: ≥4 warnings if present, sensitivity ratings, model-boundary implications.

lanes.acceptance: Named references, empirical context, calibration sources, source-grounded relations, exact same-slug block citations and embeds.
lanes.minimums: ≥3 named historical/empirical references and ≥5 source-grounded relation predicates.
